semantic.role: Central error handling foundation providing standardized error types, error codes, and a conversion utility for the entire ArchSpine system.
responsibilities: Define `ArchSpineError` as the base error class with code, cause, and context metadata for all system errors.
Declare `ArchSpineErrorCode` as the union type of all valid error codes.
Provide `ErrorCodes` constant mapping semantic error names to string codes (CLI, runtime, publish, config, etc.).
Expose `toArchSpineError` factory to wrap unknown errors into typed `ArchSpineError` instances with a fallback code and message.
Define `ArchSpineErrorOptions` interface for optional cause, context, and exitCode propagation.
outOfScope: No business logic or domain rules are encoded here.
No I/O operations, database access, or file system interactions.
No CLI command, HTTP handler, or MCP tool definitions.
No configuration loading or parsing logic.
invariants: All modules in the ArchSpine system should use `ArchSpineError` as the canonical error type for propagation.
Error codes must be defined in the `ErrorCodes` constant and their union type `ArchSpineErrorCode` must remain consistent.
Core modules (like this one) must not import from CLI entry modules (satisfied: zero imports).

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Establish a consistent, readable error taxonomy across the entire codebase to improve debuggability and enable downstream error handling.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: The file was part of a broader release gate fix and source sync (commit 4a6aac8). No semantic changes to the error contract are evident; likely minor formatting or code style alignment.

publicSurface.description: Base error class for all ArchSpine system errors, carrying a machine-readable code, optional cause, and optional context metadata. Consumed by every layer for error propagation.
Interface for optional parameters when constructing an ArchSpineError, including cause, context, and exitCode.
Union type of all valid error code strings derived from the ErrorCodes constant. Used for type-safe error code references.
Constant dictionary mapping symbolic error names to string codes for CLI usage, runtime, publish, and configuration errors. Referenced by all error-throwing modules.
Converts an unknown error into a typed ArchSpineError with a provided fallback code and message. Used by catch clauses across the codebase to normalize error handling.

English.role: Central error handling foundation providing standardized error types, error codes, and a conversion utility for the entire ArchSpine system.
responsibilities: Define `ArchSpineError` as the base error class with code, cause, and context metadata for all system errors.
Declare `ArchSpineErrorCode` as the union type of all valid error codes.
Provide `ErrorCodes` constant mapping semantic error names to string codes (CLI, runtime, publish, config, etc.).
Expose `toArchSpineError` factory to wrap unknown errors into typed `ArchSpineError` instances with a fallback code and message.
Define `ArchSpineErrorOptions` interface for optional cause, context, and exitCode propagation.
outOfScope: No business logic or domain rules are encoded here.
No I/O operations, database access, or file system interactions.
No CLI command, HTTP handler, or MCP tool definitions.
No configuration loading or parsing logic.

exports.name: toArchSpineError
exports.signature:
toArchSpineError(
  error: unknown,
  fallbackCode: ArchSpineErrorCode,
  fallbackMessage: string,
  options: ArchSpineErrorOptions = {},
)
